arts.ttl: Southampton vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Leicester earned a huge 5-0 victory over Southampton when these two sides most recently squared off in the Championship last season, but it's unlikely to be such a one-sided affair at St Mary's on Saturday. Southampton predicted lineup vs Leicester (4-3-3) : Ramsdale; Sugawara, Harwood-Bellis, Bednarek, Walker-Peters; Fernandes, Downes, Aribo; Dibling, Archer, Fraser.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest suffer double blow ahead of huge Leicester City clash
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo won’t be able to direct his team from the dugout against Leicester City next week after receiving a three-game touchline ban. With Nuno unable to sit in the dugout for the next three matches, he will be absent for next Friday’s big East Midlands derby at the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper drops Facundo Buonanotte hint as he sets Leicester City challenge for teenager
arts.sum: Steve Cooper has challenged Facundo Buonanotte to prove he can adapt to a top player’s schedule and make an impact for Leicester City this weekend. Cooper said: “He made 27 league appearances for Brighton last season and that's probably why we are seeing him being more than capable of being in the Premier League as a young player.

arts.ttl: Pundit suggests manager faces the sack in 'must-win' Southampton v Leicester City predictions
arts.sum: Leicester City will have not wished for the Premier League to take a break having finally struck a winning chord, but Saturday's task against Southampton still remains the same.
